message:
fix: correct board detail panel box drawing and add GITHUB_TOKEN support for self-update (#116, #117)

Board view (#116): The detail panel's RoundedBorder overhead (2 chars)
was not subtracted from boardWidth, causing the combined layout to exceed
terminal width and corrupt box-drawing characters. Also align the title
bar width to the actual rendered columns width instead of boardWidth to
prevent integer-division remainder misalignment.

Self-update (#117): Add githubToken()/setGitHubAuth() helpers that check
GITHUB_TOKEN then GH_TOKEN env vars and attach a Bearer Authorization
header to all GitHub API requests (checkForUpdates, GetLatestRelease,
downloadFile). This raises the rate limit from 60 to 5000 req/hr and
avoids 403 errors on shared IPs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
